meta_title: Comparison of Inflatable Screens | Buying Guide
meta_desc: Compare our inflatable cinema screens: giant vs waterproof vs economical. Comparative table of 16 criteria for choosing the right screen.
hero_desc: Find out why Hallucine screens outperform the competition on every criterion: lightness, installation, warranty, carbon footprint and much more.
table_desc: 16 criteria to help you make the right choice.
hall_logistics: Estate car - 80 kg packed in a 1.4 m bag
hall_screen: No need to remove, machine washable (8 kg)
hall_wind: Flexible, withstands winds of up to 38 km/h (6 Beaufort)
hall_setup: 1 person / 45 min - light structure and pre-positioned canvas
hall_teardown: 30 min - 1 person - no need to remove the canvas
hall_versatility: Can be installed on roofs, boats and inaccessible areas - no lifting equipment required
hall_safety: Reduces the risk of injury and downtime (RSI)
hall_flexibility: Flexible design, bends in the wind
hall_impact: Minimal impact: historic monuments, stadium lawns, etc.
comp_logistics: Truck with tailgate - Flycase 260 kg + 50 kg = 310 kg
comp_screen: Must be removed after each session, complex maintenance
comp_wind: More vulnerable to gusts, rigid structure
comp_setup: 4 people / 60 min - complex weight and assembly
comp_teardown: 120 min - 4 people - canvas removed with 200 elastic bands
comp_versatility: Requires pallet truck, forklift, crane, etc.
comp_experience: Experience varies depending on the company
comp_safety: Major physical effort and increased risks
comp_flexibility: Rigid design, less suited to windy conditions
args_title: Why choose a Hallucine Inflatable Screen?
args_desc: Here are the 7 main reasons why Hallucine screens are the number one choice of event professionals worldwide.
arg1_text: Hallucine inflatable screens are 3 times lighter than competing products, making them easy to transport and install. You can transport a 13-metre screen in an estate car, without needing a heavy lorry. This reduces logistics costs and the need for bulky equipment.
arg2_text: Thanks to its lightweight structure and easy-to-handle projection screen fabric, a Hallucine screen can be set up in just 45 minutes by just one person. Dismantling is just as quick and easy. In contrast, competitors require up to 4 people and 2 hours to install and remove the screen.
arg3_text: The light weight of Hallucine screens reduces physical effort and lowers the risk of injury (particularly RSI), thus contributing to the well-being of teams. Competing screens, which are heavier and more complex to handle, increase physical stress and the risk of accidents.
arg4_text: Hallucine screens are suitable for installation in atypical locations such as on roofs or boats, without the need for heavy handling equipment (such as forklifts or cranes). This makes them ideal for events in hard-to-reach locations.
arg5_text: Our projection screen fabric does not need to be removed after each projection and is machine-washable (8 kg), which greatly simplifies maintenance. Unlike the competition, where the fabric has to be removed manually, with numerous elastic bands and more complex maintenance.
arg6_text: The Hallucine screen is designed to withstand winds of up to 38 km/h thanks to its flexible structure. Competing screens, which are more rigid, are less resistant to gusts and can be vulnerable in windy conditions.
arg7_text: We offer a 10-year guarantee on all our screens, at no extra cost. Competitors' screens have a 2-year limited warranty, often with costly extensions.
benefit1_desc: Create a unique atmosphere for your screenings or presentations. The giant inflatable screen turns any venue into a cinema.
benefit2_desc: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor events. Festivals, drive-ins, weddings, conferences, product launches.
benefit3_desc: Impress your guests with professional, attractive equipment. 30 years of expertise at the service of your events.
cta_desc: Discover our full range of screens or ask for a personalised quote.
visuels_desc: Transport and handling: the practical differences between a Hallucine screen and a traditional screen.
visuel1_alt: A 10-metre Hallucine inflatable screen in the boot of a small car, compared to a rival screen that requires a lorry
visuel2_alt: Weight comparison: 5-metre portable screen (105 kg) versus 5-metre waterproof Hallucine screen (18 kg)
